channel.title: Francisco Obando | Data Engineer

item.title: The Future of Data Processing
item.description: Short thought on real-time data streaming.

item.title: Distributed Ledger Project
item.description: A high-performance distributed ledger implemented in Rust.

item.title: My First Technical Post
item.description: Exploring the challenges of distributed consistency.

item.title: About Me
item.description:
I am an accomplished Senior Data Engineer with over 8 years of experience in designing and scaling data platforms and cloud architectures. My expertise lies in building robust event-driven systems and optimizing infrastructure to drive efficiency and reliability, with a strong focus on AWS and GCP environments.

Currently, I lead data engineering efforts at Preston Ventures, where I focus on consolidating cloud workloads and enhancing data platform observability. I am passionate about bridging the gap between raw data and actionable insights through scalable, high-performance engineering solutions.

item.title: Resume
item.description:
Francisco Obando, M.Sc.

Senior Data Engineer
LinkedIn | GitHub | Email | 📄 Download PDF

Summary

Accomplished Data Engineer with over 8 years of experience designing scalable data platforms, optimizing cloud infrastructures, and implementing event-driven architectures. Proven success in reducing operational costs, improving system reliability, and ensuring compliance with data governance and security standards, including HIPAA. Adept at leading teams, driving cross-functional collaboration, and supporting machine learning and analytics use cases across cloud environments like AWS and GCP.
